spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[480px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] pb-24 relative shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] overflow-hidden

digital_wallet_card.container: relative w-full h-[220px] rounded-[24px] overflow-hidden p-6 flex flex-col justify-between border border-white/10 shadow-2xl transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1
digital_wallet_card.background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#16A34A]/20 via-[#141414] to-[#0A0A0A] backdrop-blur-2xl
digital_wallet_card.glow: absolute -right-10 -top-10 w-32 h-32 bg-[#16A34A]/30 rounded-full blur-3xl

metric_card.container: bg-[#141414] rounded-[20px] p-5 border border-white/5 flex flex-col gap-2
metric_card.icon_wrapper: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center text-[#16A34A]
metric_card.label: text-sm text-[#A3A3A3]

transaction_item.container: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-[#141414]/50 rounded-[16px] border border-white/5 hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors
transaction_item.icon_expense: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] flex items-center justify-center
transaction_item.icon_income: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#16A34A]/10 text-[#16A34A] flex items-center justify-center
transaction_item.title: text-base font-medium text-white
transaction_item.subtitle: text-sm text-[#737373]

ai_chat_bubble.user: bg-[#16A34A] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-end shadow-lg
ai_chat_bubble.nocker_ai: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] self-start shadow-md flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden
ai_chat_bubble.ai_glow: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-[#16A34A] to-transparent opacity-50

bottom_navigation.container: fixed bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-[480px] h-[88px] bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 flex items-center justify-around px-2 z-50 rounded-t-[24px]
bottom_navigation.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 min-w-[64px]

buttons.primary: w-full bg-[#16A34A] text-white rounded-full py-4 font-semibold text-lg hover:bg-[#15803d] transition-all active:scale-[0.98] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(22,163,74,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full py-4 font-medium text-lg hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.icon: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

media_urls.description: Professional avatar for user profile in the top header.
Premium abstract texture for digital credit card background (use with opacity 10-20% and mix-blend-overlay).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Design this as a MOBILE APP VIEWPORT in the web browser. The main wrapper must have `max-w-[480px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden`.
Do NOT build a sidebar. Build a fixed Bottom Tab Navigation (`bottom_navigation.container`) with 4-5 key tabs (e.g., Home, Extract/Transactions, Nocker AI Chat, Cards, Profile).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for complex mobile layouts. Use Shadcn components for Select, Dialogs, and Charts (Recharts).

For the dashboard, stack the following vertically: Header (Avatar + Greetings) -> Digital Wallet Card (Balance & Card details) -> Quick Actions Grid (4 items) -> Financial Evolution (Line Chart using Shadcn) -> AI Insights (Nocker Card) -> Recent Transactions List.

For Charts: Use dark theme configurations. Line charts should use a smooth curve (monotone) with `#16A34A` stroke and a gradient fill `from-[#16A34A]/40 to-transparent`. Hide the grid lines or make them very subtle (`stroke-white/5`).
Implement the Nocker AI Chat view as a standalone screen or a prominent bottom sheet/dialog with a futuristic feel. Include a 'typing' animation bubble.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, nav items, transaction rows).
Use Lucide React for all icons. Ensure stroke width is 1.5 or 2 for a modern, crisp look.
Round corners heavily. Apply `rounded-[16px]`, `rounded-[20px]`, or `rounded-[24px]` for a fluid, app-like aesthetic.
